detail: sub-spec 1/19: CRITICAL-1: CombatTimeline path wrong — spec says src/components/combat/ but actual is src/features/combat/, CRITICAL-2: CombatTimeline props are { combatNoteId: string; onClose } — component internally fetches note by ID, cannot accept encounter data without interface change, contradicting 'no interface modification' constraint, CRITICAL-3: bundle.ts references characterRecordSchema (doesn't exist as Zod), noteSchema (actual: baseNoteSchema), attachmentMetaSchema (actual: attachmentSchema) — three naming mismatches will cause TS compilation failure, CRITICAL-4: Migration guard uses tx.table('meta') but only 'metadata' table exists in Dexie schema — will fail at runtime or create redundant table; sub-spec 2/19: CRITICAL: characterRecordSchema Zod schema does not exist in src/types/character.ts — bundle.ts cannot import it, CRITICAL: attachmentMetaSchema does not exist — src/types/attachment.ts exports attachmentSchema (name mismatch), CRITICAL: noteSchema does not exist — src/types/note.ts exports baseNoteSchema (name mismatch affects bundle.ts import AND visibility extension target), CRITICAL: partyMemberSchema import path ./partyMember is wrong — schema lives in ./party; sub-spec 3/19: C1: CombatTimeline.tsx path is src/features/combat/ not src/components/combat/, C2: Migration uses non-existent 'meta' table — should be 'metadata' with {id, key, value} shape, C3: characterRecordSchema does not exist — character.ts uses TypeScript interface not Zod, C4: attachmentMetaSchema does not exist — actual export is attachmentSchema, C5: noteSchema does not exist — actual export is baseNoteSchema, C6: partyMemberSchema import path wrong — ./partyMember should be ./party; sub-spec 4/19: CRITICAL: Import path for generateId/nowISO is wrong — spec says '../../utils/id' but codebase uses '../../utils/ids' and '../../utils/dates' as separate imports, CRITICAL: DB access pattern uses db.table() but codebase convention is typed accessors (db.notes, db.campaigns) — need SS-01 to declare typed table accessors or spec must acknowledge divergence, CRITICAL: update() throws on not-found but acceptance criterion says no function throws for expected failures — contradicts itself (existing repos do throw, so acceptance criterion should be revised); CRITICAL: Main navigation entry point is underspecified — BottomNav.tsx is a hardcoded 3-tab bar and spec doesn't specify how to add Bestiary (4th tab? nested under existing tab? accessible from More screen?). Worker cannot safely decide this alone.; sub-spec 6/19: CRITICAL: entityLinkRepository.create() should be entityLinkRepository.createLink() — wrong function name will cause TypeScript errors, CRITICAL: entityLinkRepository.listByEntity() does not exist — must use getLinksFrom(encounterId, 'contains') instead, CRITICAL: activeEncounterId has no delivery mechanism into useNoteActions — spec must specify context provider, direct lookup, or alternative auto-linking approach; sub-spec 7/19: AC #1 and manual verification #1 reference 'CombatTimeline' but body instructs building new CombatEncounterView — contradictory instructions will confuse worker, Constraints section retains old 'adapter' language that contradicts the 'build from scratch' body — worker may escalate unnecessarily; sub-spec 8/19: CRITICAL: QuickNoteDrawer has no type picker — spec targets wrong file. The actual type picker is in NoteEditorScreen.tsx using NOTE_TYPES., CRITICAL: Shared constant NOTE_TYPES triggers the spec's own escalation rule — spec needs explicit guidance on how to filter without modifying the shared constant., CRITICAL: Acceptance criterion #4 references QuickNoteDrawer picker which doesn't exist — criterion is untestable as written.; CRITICAL: Pseudocode uses nonexistent repository method names (noteRepository.getById vs actual getNoteById, etc.) — Step 6 partially mitigates but risky if worker copies verbatim; CRITICAL: entityLinkRepository.listByEntity() does not exist — actual API is getLinksFrom(id, relType) + getLinksTo(id, relType) requiring iteration over relationship types; CRITICAL: partyRepository.listBySession(sessionId) does not exist — only getPartyByCampaign(campaignId) is available; CRITICAL: characterRecordSchema import path in phase spec points to src/types/ but the schema lives at schemas/character.schema.ts — worker following spec literally will fail tsc --noEmit; sub-spec 13/19: CRITICAL: Repository getById function names don't match spec pseudocode — 6 of 10 repositories use different names or lack getById entirely, CRITICAL: partyMemberRepository.ts does not exist — party member functions are in partyRepository.ts, CRITICAL: mergeEntity() references out-of-scope variable `bundle` in applyReparenting call; sub-spec 15/19: Spec Step 2 will create duplicate exportCharacter and exportCampaign functions in useExportActions.ts — causes TypeScript compilation failure, Spec Step 3 overwrites existing useImportActions.ts — regresses pickFile cancel handling, Spec code samples use toast.error()/toast.success() but codebase uses showToast() — causes TypeScript compilation failure, Spec Step 5 references 'Character detail screen' and 'Campaign settings screen' which do not exist in the codebase; sub-spec 19/19: NPC migration stats hardcoded to 0 but phase spec verification expects extracted values (hp=15, armor=2, movement=8) — verification Step 4 will always fail, Phase spec references 'meta' table but actual schema uses 'metadata' table — verification Steps 2 and 5 reference wrong table name
